narrative:
Lima 7A (precinct in Allen County) has 1,140 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
